# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- User prefers a top-left quick-nav toggle on all Views/*/Index.cshtml pages, styled like existing small action buttons, using the '≡' symbol instead of the text 'Navigate', for easier navigation across component pages.
- User prefers a top-right smooth dropdown navigation on all Views/*/Index.cshtml pages for easier navigation across component pages.
- User prefers the Drone Builder page visual style to match the smoother Battery page vibe (soft styling, no harsh bootstrap-like top layout), while keeping the dropdown quick-nav.
